meta.title: Terms of Use
meta.description: The terms governing your use of the NavDhan website and services.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

intro.heading: Terms of Use
intro.body: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the NavDhan website, application, and related services owned and operated by Kubar Protocol Private Limited. Please read them carefully before using our services.

sections.title: தமிழ்
sections.body: தமிழ் மொழிபெயர்ப்பு விரைவில் வரும். இந்த கோப்பு தமிழ் உள்ளூர்மயமாக்கலுக்கான இடப்பிடியாகும்.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By accessing or using NavDhan, you agree to be bound by these terms and all applicable laws. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 18 years old and a resident of India. You must be authorised to represent any business you apply for. Services are available only where permitted by law.

sections.title: Role of NavDhan
sections.body: NavDhan is a technology intermediary that connects MSME borrowers with RBI-registered lenders. We do not lend money ourselves, guarantee approvals, or control lender decisions.

items.heading: Accurate information
items.body: Provide truthful and complete information in every application.

items.heading: Lawful use
items.body: Use the platform only for lawful purposes.

items.heading: No misuse
items.body: Do not attempt to disrupt, reverse-engineer, or scrape the platform.

sections.title: Application accuracy
sections.body: Providing false or misleading information may result in rejection, suspension, or legal action. Lenders rely on the accuracy of the data you provide.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content, trademarks, logos, and software on NavDhan are owned by Kubar Protocol Private Limited or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute them without written permission.

items.heading: No financial advice
items.body: Information on NavDhan is not financial, legal, or tax advice.

items.heading: No guarantee of offers
items.body: Display of loan options is illustrative and subject to lender approval.

items.heading: Third-party services
items.body: Links to partner sites are governed by their own terms.

sections.title: Indemnity
sections.body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless NavDhan and its affiliates from claims arising out of your use of the services, your content, or your violation of these terms.

items.heading: Direct damages
items.body: Liability is limited to fees actually paid to NavDhan, which are typically zero.

items.heading: Excluded damages
items.body: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

items.heading: Statutory rights
items.body: Nothing in these terms overrides your statutory consumer rights.

sections.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

sections.title: Changes to terms
sections.body: We may revise these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
